from __future__ import annotations

class ItemModel:
    def __init__(self, item_id, score):
        self.item_id = item_id
        self.score = score

    def model_dump(self):
        return {"item_id": self.item_id, "score": self.score}


def python_perf_layer_serialization_pydantic_model_recreated_for_internal_dict_positive(rows):
    return [ItemModel(row["item_id"], row["score"]).model_dump() for row in rows]
